changelog: Fixed: Contribution grid visibility in Light Mode by enforcing explicit high-contrast theme-aware color mapping
Fixed: Visual rendering conflicts where logged workout dots were incorrectly appearing white on white backgrounds
Fixed: Removed unreliable CSS variable opacity calculations in favor of static, theme-aware Tailwind utility classes
Improved: Grid dot rendering stability by transitioning from inline style objects to CSS class-based theme toggling
Optimized: Removed redundant style props to prevent layout reflows during theme switching
